findings.summary: No datasheets directory found (254/256 parts have MPNs). Sync datasheets before making pin-level claims.
findings.recommendation: Run datasheet sync via the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill (which one depends on the user's distributor access and API credentials). A ./datasheets/ directory with PDFs and a manifest.json enables pin-level verification in the next analyzer run.

report_context.impact: Review claims must stay at consistency level until datasheets land.

findings.summary: Net M1 has multiple global/hierarchical labels: /348403b9-c2a7-4f19-b4cb-22362ec3479a/SIGNAL_INPUT, M1
findings.description: Net 'M1' is labelled with multiple names: /348403b9-c2a7-4f19-b4cb-22362ec3479a/SIGNAL_INPUT, M1. KiCad treats this as one electrical net, but a future refactor that renames one label without the other silently decouples the two halves.
findings.recommendation: Pick the canonical name and remove the other labels, OR document the alias intentionally (e.g. an expressly named test point). If this is a cross-sheet connection via both global and hierarchical labels, prefer one or the other style consistently.

report_context.impact: Maintainability — silent alias across future edits.

low-pass RC filter
Net +BATT carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.summary: Sourcing nearly complete: 26/28 unique parts have MPNs (93%). Fill in remaining lines.
findings.description: Sourcing audit: 26 of 28 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (92.9%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
findings.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

findings.summary: Net AHIGH: 10.0V / 3.3V domain crossing without level shifter
findings.description: Net AHIGH connects ICs in 10.0V and 3.3V domains. The 10.0V output may exceed the 3.3V input absolute maximum rating of 3.6V, risking damage.
findings.recommendation: Add a level shifter between the 10.0V and 3.3V domains on net AHIGH, or verify that the connected ICs have tolerant inputs.

report_context.impact: Risk of damage or unreliable logic levels

top_issues.summary: Net AHIGH: 10.0V / 3.3V domain crossing without level shifter
top_issues.description: Net AHIGH connects ICs in 10.0V and 3.3V domains. The 10.0V output may exceed the 3.3V input absolute maximum rating of 3.6V, risking damage.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a level shifter between the 10.0V and 3.3V domains on net AHIGH, or verify that the connected ICs have tolerant inputs.

report_context.impact: Risk of damage or unreliable logic levels

top_issues.summary: No datasheets directory found (254/256 parts have MPNs). Sync datasheets before making pin-level claims.
top_issues.recommendation: Run datasheet sync via the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill (which one depends on the user's distributor access and API credentials). A ./datasheets/ directory with PDFs and a manifest.json enables pin-level verification in the next analyzer run.

report_context.impact: Review claims must stay at consistency level until datasheets land.

top_issues.description: Net +BATT carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.
